name: Tobila Systems Inc.
summary: Tobila Systems Inc. develops and provides fraud filtering systems in Japan. The company offers prank call filter services for mobile and business phones, as well as nuisance call filter services for landlines. It also provides other services, which include netcomfy, a content blocker application for iPhone; phone number.com, an online phonebook; and HP4U, a homepage production service that include coverage, photography, and production. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
